For depression, bipolar, or other depressive mood disorders, beneficiaries must have at least one 
inpatient, skilled nursing facility (SNF), or home health claim, or two Part B (institutional or non-
institutional) claims that are at least one day apart, with a depression, bipolar, or other depressive 
mood disorders code in any position during the two-year reference period.
